questions.title: What types of content can I save?
questions.content: Purl supports links (any URL), PDFs, YouTube videos, and audio files. When you save a link, Purl automatically fetches the title, favicon, and full text. PDFs are fully parsed, YouTube videos get their transcripts extracted, and audio is transcribed via Whisper. YouTube transcripts and audio transcription are included on Pro; see pricing for limits.

questions.title: How does the AI chat work?
questions.content: You can ask Purl anything about your saved content in plain English — for example, "what did I read about machine learning last week?" Purl searches across all your saved articles, PDFs, and videos and returns a synthesized answer with sources, so you always know where the information came from.

questions.title: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
questions.content: The Free plan lets you save unlimited links and upload PDFs and audio files. Pro unlocks AI chat and transcript extraction for all your saved content — powered by your own OpenAI API key. There's no monthly subscription for Pro; just add your key in Settings and you only pay OpenAI directly for what you use.

questions.title: Is my saved content private?
questions.content: Yes. Your library is private to you — only you can see what you've saved and the answers you receive. Purl does not share your content with other users or use it to train AI models.

questions.title: Do I need an OpenAI account?
questions.content: Only if you want to use AI chat or transcript extraction. Create a free account at platform.openai.com, generate an API key, and add it in your Purl Settings. You'll be billed directly by OpenAI based on your usage — typically a few cents per conversation.
